Tracker.title: Tracker
Tracker.description: State tracking for a maid, including base salary, free leaves, attendance records, and cash advances.

attendance.description: A map of date strings (YYYY-MM-DD) to attendance status ('PRESENT' | 'ABSENT' | 'UNMARKED').

baseSalary.description: Monthly base salary of the maid.

freeAbsentsPerMonth.description: Number of free absent days allowed per month.

cashAdvances.description: List of recorded cash advances requested by the maid.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the data was last saved to the cloud.

/trackers/{syncCode}.description: Stores tracking data for each sync code group.
